messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0165",
  "title": "游戏",
  "page_index": 1,
  "page_range": "1"
}

Section text:
## 游戏

message.content: This section consists solely of the heading “游戏” (Games) and contains no substantive text, data, or references. Consequently, it cannot answer retrieval questions regarding specific entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types. It only indicates that the broader document may cover the general topic of games, but this excerpt lacks the content necessary to support any factual, procedural, or analytical queries.
